message:
feat(demo_showcase): Expand showcase binary with full TUI implementation (+500 lines)

Major expansion of the demo_showcase binary:

- Full application state machine with page navigation
- Keyboard input handling with vim-style bindings
- Multi-page layout system (dashboard, components, themes, about)
- Interactive widget demonstrations
- Responsive terminal size handling
- Status bar with real-time information
- Help overlay system

The showcase now serves as a comprehensive demonstration of
opentui_rust capabilities, suitable for documentation and testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
